commands.review_summary:
Updates Ollama discovery to use the resolver's `discoveryApiKey` for non-local endpoints while preserving marker-based local auth and adding focused catalog regressions.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main returns the configured `OLLAMA_API_KEY` marker before the real resolved discovery credential on the cloud path. I did not run executable tests because this review was explicitly read-only.
commands.review_followup: No repair lane is needed because there are no blocking code findings; the remaining action is maintainer review and any desired live Ollama Cloud proof.
